class ConnectionSetup:
    def __init__(self):
        self._connected = False
        self._socket = None

    def configure(self, host, port):
        self._host = host
        self._port = port

    def connect(self):
        self._socket = socket.create_connection((self._host, self._port))
        self._connected = True

    def authenticate(self, username, password):
        if not self._connected:
            raise RuntimeError("Must call connect() before authenticate()")
        self._socket.send(f"AUTH {username} {password}\n".encode())

    def send(self, data):
        if not self._connected:
            raise RuntimeError("Must call connect() before send()")
        self._socket.send(data.encode())

    def close(self):
        if self._socket:
            self._socket.close()
            self._connected = False

class PipelineBuilder:
    def __init__(self):
        self._steps = []

    def add_source(self, source):
        self._steps.append(("source", source))

    def add_transform(self, fn):
        if not self._steps:
            raise RuntimeError("Must add source before transform")
        self._steps.append(("transform", fn))

    def add_sink(self, sink):
        if not self._steps:
            raise RuntimeError("Must add source before sink")
        self._steps.append(("sink", sink))

    def execute(self):
        data = None
        for step_type, step_fn in self._steps:
            if step_type == "source":
                data = step_fn()
            elif step_type == "transform":
                data = step_fn(data)
            elif step_type == "sink":
                step_fn(data)
        return data
